emails.subject: Follow up to Westinghouse letter
emails.body: Follow up to Westinghouse letter Kay, I am not sure what we decided on Friday. Are we going to send another (more friendly) letter to the Westinghouse people evidencing a willingness to discuss the draw issue? Please let me know at your convenience. Stuart

emails.subject: Follow up to Westinghouse letter
emails.body: Follow up to Westinghouse letter Kay, I am not sure what we decided on Friday. Are we going to send another (more friendly) letter to the Westinghouse people evidencing a willingness to discuss the draw issue? Please let me know at your convenience. Stuart

emails.subject: Re: Follow up to Westinghouse letter
emails.body: Re: Follow up to Westinghouse letter Hi Stuart, I believe the plant manager was going to call someone at SW, to keep the communication lines open. I'll be glad to draft a friendly letter to follow up. Kay From: Stuart Zisman@ECT on 05/21/2001 09:35 AM
